name: tsconfig
description: Shared TypeScript base configuration with strict mode, noImplicitReturns, noUnusedLocals, ES2017 target, and CommonJS modules.
when_to_use: Shared TypeScript base configuration with strict mode, noImplicitReturns, noUnusedLocals, ES2017 target, and CommonJS modules
avoid: Not for browser-only ESM builds or projects targeting a different ES version without overriding compilerOptions.
not_for: Not for browser-only ESM builds or projects targeting a different ES version without overriding compilerOptions.

name: tsconfig
description: Gravity UI shared TypeScript configuration for projects. Enables strict mode, noImplicitReturns, noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters, and targets ES2017 with CommonJS modules.
when_to_use: Starting a new TypeScript project in the Gravity UI ecosystem
Ensuring consistent TypeScript compiler options across multiple packages
Extending a base config that enforces strict type safety
avoid: Do not use if your project targets a different ES version or module system than CommonJS — override compilerOptions after extending
Not suitable for browser-only ESM builds without overriding the module field
how_to_use: Install with `npm install --save-dev @gravity-ui/tsconfig`. Create `tsconfig.json` at the project root with `{ "extends": "@gravity-ui/tsconfig/tsconfig.json" }`. Override individual compilerOptions as needed.
